title: LuckyLootChest
description: Use the player's Luck attribute to affect Chess' loot table, highly configurable!
body:
### This mod uses the player's Luck attribute to affect chest' loot table, rather than just letting luck affect fishing.

At present, this mod has added a setting: when players open any loot box, the number of loot will be increased based on their luck value. Each luck value will increase by one item, but not more than 10 at most.

### Example:
###  Luck lvl:0

![0 luck attribute](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba15fc85f62fac1e4327f5d6f3779d15caa04340.png)
###  Luck lvl:5
![2LUCK](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0f8f643c463fa4e78ca15d1ea707628c1c65f1e.png)

###  Luck lvl:10

![3 LUCK](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea80d56d86b4aa83d344446eeda73aa3515086a5.png)
### These are all configurable:
-   What is the maximum number of items that increase Luck (in loot chests).
-   Loot chests are forbidden to double items with a maximum stack quantity of 1，This will reduce the problem of loot being repelled by a large number of non-stackable items.
-   Each Luck value affects how many items are added to the loot table.
